description: GitHub Trending - 适合开源趋势日报、周报、月报的清爽技术分析主题

styles.body: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; font-size: 15.5px; color: #20242d; line-height: 1.82; letter-spacing: 0.2px; word-spacing: 1px; padding: 20px 22px; background: #ffffff;
styles.h1: font-size: 23px; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; text-align: left; margin: 32px 0 20px; padding: 0 0 12px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #111827; line-height: 1.4;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; margin: 38px 0 16px; padding: 10px 14px; border-left: 4px solid #22c55e; background: #f6fbf8; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; line-height: 1.5;
styles.h3: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #1f2937; margin: 26px 0 12px; padding: 0 0 6px 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed #bbf7d0;
styles.p: margin: 15px 0; text-indent: 0; text-align: justify; color: #20242d; line-height: 1.85;
styles.blockquote: margin: 22px 0; padding: 16px 18px; background: #f8fafc; border-left: 3px solid #22c55e; color: #425066; font-size: 14.5px; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; line-height: 1.8;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 6px; margin: 22px auto; display: block; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
styles.strong: color: #111827; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 62%, #dcfce7 62%, #dcfce7 95%, transparent 95%); padding: 1px 5px;
styles.code_inline: background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f766e; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
styles.code_block: background: #111827; color: #e5e7eb; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12.5px; line-height: 1.65; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Menlo', 'Consolas', 'SF Mono', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre; margin: 24px 0; border: 1px solid #243041;
styles.ol: margin: 18px 0; padding-left: 0; list-style: none; counter-reset: list;
styles.li_bullet: color: #16a34a; font-weight: 900; font-size: 14px; display: inline-block; min-width: 16px; margin-right: 8px; text-align: left;
styles.li_number: color: #16a34a; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; min-width: 22px; display: inline-block; margin-right: 10px;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #bbf7d0, transparent); margin: 36px 0;
styles.a: color: #0f766e; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(15,118,110,0.35); padding-bottom: 1px;
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 24px 0; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; table-layout: fixed; word-break: break-word;
styles.th: background: #111827; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 12px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12.5px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.5;
styles.td: padding: 10px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #edf2f7; color: #20242d; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.55;
styles.caption: font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a93a3; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #86efac; letter-spacing: 12px; font-size: 11px; margin: 34px 0; user-select: none;

highlights.hl_yellow: background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 55%, #fef08a 55%); color: #20242d; padding: 1px 6px; font-weight: 600;

list_style.label: GitHub Trending
list_style.num_container: display: inline-block; background: #111827; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 800; font-size: 11px; min-width: 24px; height: 22px; line-height: 22px; text-align: center; border-radius: 4px; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 2px;
list_style.bullet_container: display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: #22c55e; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 12px; vertical-align: 3px;
